signals.headline: Whale Accumulation Signal | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Whale Accumulation Signal | YES | MED confidence**

On-chain data shows that for only the second week in 2026, Bitcoin wallets holding more than 10,000 BTC saw inflows, suggesting whale accumulation rather than ETF-driven demand[2]. If this trend continues, analysts predict it could trigger a supply squeeze pushing Bitcoin toward the $75,000-$80,000 range[2].
